programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: When a bounty hunter and a band of unlikely heroes pursue a killer, they find themselves in a no-man's-land. 2024. US. Director: Elliott Lester. Starring: Peter Dinklage, Juliette Lewis.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/5. Becoming king initially paralyses Louis, and Marie is drawn into the tussle over the choice of prime minister. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule S1 E5.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: 1/6. To salvage the royal marriage - and their nations' alliance - Antoinette's brother Joseph intervenes. 2022. France. Director: Geoffrey Enthoven. Starring: Emilia Schule S1 E6.

programme.title: The Penguin Lessons
programme.desc: A British teacher becomes the student after he rescues an orphaned penguin from an oil slick. 2024. USA. Director: Peter Cattaneo. Starring: Steve Coogan, Jonathan Pryce.

programme.title: ASOG
programme.desc: Follow the story of TV host-turned teacher as they leave their job and unsupportive boyfriend to persue their dream life, winning 'Ms. Gay Saigon'. 2023. Canada, Philippines. Director: Sean Devlin.

programme.title: The White Ribbon
programme.desc: A series of attacks on upperclass townsfolk triggers an inquiry with no credible suspects. 2008. Germany, Austria. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Christian Friedel, Ernst Jacobi.

programme.title: Legacy: Apartheid's Shadow
programme.desc: Apartheid in South Africa may have fallen, however, the shadow of the brutal regime remains. 2024. South Africa. Director: Tara Erica Moore.

programme.title: Gabrielle
programme.desc: The story of a wealthy couple's declining marriage after the discovery of a letter belonging to Gabrielle. 2005. France. Director: Patrice Chereau. Starring: Isabelle Huppert, Pascal Greggory.

programme.title: Clean Slate
programme.desc: Humiliated by everyone around him, a police chief wants a clean slate in life - and resorts to drastic means to do so. 1981. France. Director: Bertrand Tavernier. Starring: Isabelle Huppert.

programme.title: At First Sight
programme.desc: The passionate friendship between two women leads them to abandon their respective spouses and open a dress shop together. 1983. France. Director: Diane Kurys. Starring: Isabelle Huppert.

programme.title: The Penguin Lessons
programme.desc: A British teacher becomes the student after he rescues an orphaned penguin from an oil slick. 2024. USA. Director: Peter Cattaneo. Starring: Steve Coogan, Jonathan Pryce.

programme.title: ASOG
programme.desc: Follow the story of TV host-turned teacher as they leave their job and unsupportive boyfriend to persue their dream life, winning 'Ms. Gay Saigon'. 2023. Canada, Philippines. Director: Sean Devlin.

programme.title: Lourdes
programme.desc: Afflicted with multiple sclerosis, Christine recieves a miracle on arrival at the holy site of Lourdes. 2009. Austria, France. Director: Jessica Hausner. Starring: Sylvie Testud, Lea Seydoux.

programme.title: Legacy: Apartheid's Shadow
programme.desc: Apartheid in South Africa may have fallen, however, the shadow of the brutal regime remains. 2024. South Africa. Director: Tara Erica Moore.

programme.title: At First Sight
programme.desc: The passionate friendship between two women leads them to abandon their respective spouses and open a dress shop together. 1983. France. Director: Diane Kurys. Starring: Isabelle Huppert.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
